name: Vodafone Group Plc
description: Vodafone Group Plc is a leading multinational telecommunications company headquartered in Newbury, England. As one of the largest providers in Europe and Africa, the company focuses on connecting people, businesses, and communities through next-generation mobile and broadband networks. Vodafone is committed to building an inclusive, sustainable, and trusted digital society by leveraging innovation in connectivity, IoT, and digital services. Through its extensive global operations and strategic partnerships, the company empowers consumers and organizations to thrive in a digital world while prioritizing environmental responsibility and digital inclusion.
